nasb.text: And they do not consider in their hearts That I remember all their wickedness. Now their deeds are all around them; They are before My face.

esv.text: But they do not consider that I remember all their evil. Now their deeds surround them; they are before my face.

cnv.text: 他們心裡並未想到， 我記得他們的一切罪惡。 他們所作的一切，現在都圍繞他們， 都在我面前。

ccb.text: 他们没有想到我记得他们的所有恶行。 如今他们的罪恶环绕他们， 都暴露在我面前。
